Bash(node -e "const pool = require\('./src/infrastructure/database/postgres'\); pool.query\('SELECT email, role, is_active FROM users LIMIT 10'\).then\(r => { r.rows.forEach\(u => console.log\(u.email, u.role, u.is_active\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('/dev/stdin','utf8'\); const j=JSON.parse\(d\); console.log\('token:', j.token ? j.token.substring\(0,40\)+'...' : 'NONE'\); console.log\('user:', JSON.stringify\(j.user||j.error\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const pool = require\('./src/infrastructure/database/postgres'\); pool.query\('SELECT email, password_hash FROM users WHERE email=\\$1', ['superadmin@fonz.mx']\).then\(r => { if\(r.rows[0]\) console.log\('email:', r.rows[0].email, '\\nhash:', r.rows[0].password_hash\); else console.log\('user not found'\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "const pool = require\('./src/infrastructure/database/postgres'\); Promise.all\(['notification_templates','notification_events','scheduled_reminders','provider_invoice_reminders'].map\(t => pool.query\('SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name=\\$1 ORDER BY ordinal_position', [t]\).then\(r => \({ t, cols: r.rows.map\(c=>c.column_name\) }\)\)\)\).then\(all => { all.forEach\(\({t,cols}\) => console.log\(t+':', cols.join\(', '\)\)\); pool.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\(e.message\); pool.end\(\); }\);")
